creator: kjdavey@earthlink.net
text:
When attepting to build /usr/ports/graphics/gimp1...

/usr/libexec/elf/ld: warning: libxpg4.so.2, needed by /usr/X11R6/lib/libgtk12.so, may conflict with libxpg4.so.3
configure: failed program was:

Program output...

(end of "config.log")
Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/gimp1
*** Error code 1

Fix: 

Looks like a shared library conflict that the present config program is unable to deal with.
How-To-Repeat: Ran cvsup to bring my ports tree up to date and ran the build again.  Same problem persists.
